goal: Make the Daily Cat Tarot new-tab extension publishable to Edge Add-ons and Firefox AMO (Chrome already published), reusing the same source.
done: Added chrome-extension/build.sh which packages two store zips into chrome-extension/dist/: meowtarot-newtab-chrome-edge.zip (plain MV3, identical payload to the published Chrome zip - Edge accepts it as-is) and meowtarot-newtab-firefox.zip. Added manifest.firefox.json: same manifest plus browser_specific_settings.gecko.id (daily-cat-tarot@meowtarot.com) and data_collection_permissions:{required:[none]} (AMO-required; declares no data collection). Extension uses zero chrome.*/browser.* APIs so it is fully portable across all three stores. Added PUBLISHING.md with per-store upload steps (both Edge + AMO accounts are free).
verified: npx web-ext lint on the unzipped Firefox build = 0 errors / 0 warnings / 0 notices (AMO-clean). build.sh confirms the only manifest delta is the Firefox gecko block. No app/web change - only adds static chrome-extension/ build tooling.
